chip.name: none
chip.reason: Final gameweek of the season and all chips already used (WC/TC/FH/BB all spent). No chip value remains.

risks: Captaining Anderson is a differential (~6% owned) vs template Gabriel — high ceiling (60% haul) but higher variance (164.8).
Saka OUT loses Arsenal CL rotation lottery, but he is benched vs Crystal Palace (xPts only 2.63) so the downgrade risk is low.
Doubling up on NFO (Anderson + Gibbs-White) concentrates risk on one fixture.
Haaland kept in XI despite being left out of City's GW38 squad per news — should be benched/sold if confirmed; here he is a hold-only flag since no FT remains after the Saka move.
Bowen (4.83) and Thiago (2.28) remain weak XI starters but are non-transferable this week with a single FT.
